visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse aisle with a woman wearing a blue beret and a white lace dress holding two large red mesh bags of purple sweet potatoes. The background is filled with stacks of products and other customers, illuminated by bright overhead warehouse lighting. The woman smiles and speaks directly to the camera while holding the heavy bags. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a price tag and the product itself. The potatoes are deep purple and packed tightly in the mesh. The price tag clearly shows the amount and product name in English and Chinese. The camera is handheld, showing a slight natural movement. (3) Transition to a kitchen setting where several purple sweet potatoes are in a metal strainer inside a stainless steel sink. The lighting is neutral and even, highlighting the dusty texture and rich color of the raw vegetables before they are prepared. (4) The final phase takes place in a warmly lit indoor living room. Two women are present; one holds a small white Maltese dog wearing a red bow. Hands are shown breaking open a cooked purple sweet potato on a small plate, revealing its vibrant steaming purple interior. They laugh and feed small pieces to the dog.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多最新出的. (2) [Variety]: 紫心地瓜 199元一大袋. [Subtitle]: 紫心地瓜 是台灣的紫地瓜. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後它價格是 199元 有2.4公斤. (4) [Subtitle]: 平常的地瓜是 175元 所以它多了24塊錢. (5) [Subtitle]: 可是紫心地瓜 這個價格很划算 回去烤烤看. (6) [Subtitle]: 洗好的地瓜 大概有15條. (7) [Subtitle]: 紫心地瓜 烤出來的樣子. (8) [Subtitle]: 顏色非常的紫. (9) [Variety]: 滿滿的花青素. [Subtitle]: 它裡面有滿滿的花青素 以及甜度更低. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們家小孩超愛的 他吃掉半根了. (11) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈 好吃啊 那你的不好吃 他只想吃我那個.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female friend in the living room, 1 male passer-by in the warehouse, 1 partial female visible at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue Kangol beret, a black camisole under a white tiered lace top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse with high ceilings and heavy-duty shelving filled with boxed products; a modern home kitchen with a stainless steel sink; a cozy living room with a couch and soft cushions.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with high-energy female narration in Mandarin, accompanied by an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic meme-style background music. Frequent 'pop' and 'bubble' sound effects trigger with every text overlay appearing on screen. The voice is bright, clear, and highly aroused, aiming to grab immediate attention. (2) As the narrator moves into the pricing and weight details, the speech rate remains fast but becomes more informational. The background music maintains a constant 4/4 rhythm with strong synthetic beats. Short 'ding' sound effects punctuate the transitions between different shots of the product and price tag. (3) The tone shifts slightly towards casual and warm as the scene moves to the home environment. Background music continues without interruption. Laughter and soft conversational interplay between two females are audible. A stylized cartoon 'sparkle' SFX sounds when mentioning the health benefits of the sweet potato. (4) The final segment features playful laughter and high-pitched vocal reactions as the dog is fed. The music maintains its energetic pace until the very end, where a quick fade-out occurs. The overall production is polished with high signal-to-noise ratio and deliberate use of SFX for rhythmic emphasis.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price/Value Evidence -> Preparation -> Result/Taste Test
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional product review intended to influence shopping behavior at Costco. It highlights the value and health benefits of Taiwanese purple sweet potatoes through a combination of energetic hosting and cute pet interaction to build consumer trust and desire.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of price, weight, and specific store location (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy social media clip combining retail discovery with domestic pet appeal, characteristic of current 'shopping find' trends.
